title: A Lean 4 formalization of a SimpleDNF switching lemma and bounded-depth layer-collapse infrastructure
description:
A curated Lean 4 artifact for a SimpleDNF switching lemma in a canonical decision-tree encoding, together with bounded-depth formula bridge infrastructure and explicit DNF/CNF layer-collapse schedules.

Non-claims: this artifact does not prove P != NP, P = NP, an NP or circuit lower bound, a Frege/PHP lower bound, or arbitrary AC0 collapse. The two-layer CNF side is an explicit schedule/premise record, not a proved general CNF switching lemma.
